triggers: VibeSafe is a security project — default to HIGH
E2E coverage exercises user authentication and NextAuth sessions (login, signup, verify, dashboard, active-test, internal admin)
E2E coverage exercises payment/checkout flow (pricing, checkout/success, PAYMENT_TEST_FLOW bypass)
Exercises public-facing scan API (/api/v1/scans) with user-supplied URLs (user-generated content)
Exercises admin/privileged routes (src/app/internal/*) that return 404 to non-admins
Comprehensive page+component coverage is novel and cross-cutting across the whole frontend, the API surface, and the test/CI infrastructure
lane_rationale: HIGH risk + 5 tags + a novel cross-cutting effort spanning ~28 pages, ~31 components, auth, payment and CI infra; lane fail-safe forces feature-full and the very-hard/epic split (HIGH and >=3 tags).
epic_split_rationale: risk_level HIGH AND 5 tags (>=3) -> Bounded Phase-1 Constraint Round, dedicated Phase-4 specialists, cross-artifact consistency check, and Phase 7.4 retrospective all apply.
